records.ety: [L. sustentatio sustenance, maintenance, fr. sustentare to support, maintain, v. intens. fr. sustinere to sustain: cf. F. sustentation. See Sustain.]

defs: The act of sustaining, or the state of being sustained; preservation from falling; support; sustenance; maintenance.
The aggregate of the functions by which a living organism is maintained in a normal condition of weight and growth.
